title: 3.4 - Retry & Error Classification
description: Status-code-based retry with config per status (429, 502, 503, 504). Connect timeout vs stream stall timeout separation. URL fallback chain (multiple base URLs per provider). Network error classification: ECONNRESET, ETIMEDOUT, EPIPE, UND_ERR_SOCKET. Exponential backoff on retry, jittered. Max retry attempts per URL + overall. References: 9router base.js retry logic + runtimeConfig.js. Bugs avoided: first-chunk timeout dead code, retry error message lost on non-ok response.

title: 1.4 - Response Translation & SSE Streaming
description: Translate upstream response chunks to client format via SSE transform. Parse SSE events, reconstruct JSON chunks, extract usage. SINGLE [DONE] sentinel (not double). Streaming handler: connect provider Response to client through transform pipe with stall timeout and disconnect detection. Non-streaming handler: SSE-to-JSON when provider forces streaming but client wants JSON. Buffer size limit to prevent OOM. References: 9router stream.js + streamHandler.js + nonStreamingHandler.js + streamingHandler.js + sseToJsonHandler.js. Bugs avoided: double [DONE], toolArgBuffers uninitialized, error swallowed in flush, usage filter with wrong format.

title: 5.3 - Export/Import
description: Export all database scopes including disabledModels. Import replaces matching scopes, deletes orphaned rows. Password hash and OIDC secret included in export (protected by export auth). References: 9router db/index.js exportDb/importDb. Bugs avoided: disabledModels not exported, orphaned rows persist on import.

title: 5.1 - Database Layer
description: SQLite with WAL mode for concurrent read safety. Transaction-based writes with proper file locking (WAL handles concurrent readers + writers). Encrypted columns for OAuth tokens, API keys, OIDC secrets using AEAD AES-256-GCM. PRAGMA integrity_check on startup. Graceful corruption recovery (backup + re-init). References: 9router sqljsAdapter.js, connectionsRepo.js, settingsRepo.js. Bugs avoided: sql.js zero locking causes multi-process corruption, debounced 100ms writes lose data on crash, process.on(beforeExit) without .once accumulates handlers, plaintext secrets.

title: 3.3 - Specialized OAuth Executors
description: Implement each specialized executor: GitHub Copilot (token exchange, /chat/completions only, Responses API gating for claude models), Cursor (protobuf wire format, http2, gzip frames), Kiro (free tier + device code flow, separate token endpoint), Antigravity (Gemini wrapper, project ID resolution and persistence), Codex (Responses API SSE streaming via pipe). References: 9router github.js, cursor.js, kiro.js, antigravity.js, codex.js. Bugs avoided: github mutates body in-place before sanitize, cursor COMPRESS_FLAG dead code.

title: 4.2 - Dashboard Authentication
description: Password-based dashboard auth with bcrypt hashing. JWT sessions with Strict SameSite cookie. Login rate limiting with persistent store (not in-memory Map). Password reset invalidates ALL existing sessions. Initial password enforcement (force change on first login). References: 9router dashboardSession.js, login/route.js, loginLimiter.js. Bugs avoided: timing attack on password comparison (=== short-circuit), reset sets null reverting to default 123456, lax SameSite allows CSRF, in-memory rate limiter resets on restart.

title: 2.3 - Account Fallback & Model-Level Locking
description: Model-level locking with modelLock_{model} keys per connection. Exponential backoff cooldown per model. Account-level lock as fallback. Clear lock on success + lazy cleanup of expired locks. Error classification: should_fallback vs non-recoverable (400/404 should NOT fallback). Transient delay on 429 before falling to next account (prevent rate limit cascade). References: 9router accountFallback.js + auth.js markAccountUnavailable + clearAccountError. Bugs avoided: shouldFallback always true (dead code path), dead rateLimitedUntil fields vs active modelLock_*, backoff off-by-one, 429 cascade with no delay.

title: 6.1 - RTK Token Compression
description: Compress tool_result content in request bodies per detected format: git diff, git status, grep output, ls output, tree output, search results. Format auto-detection via content heuristics. Safe filter execution (catch panics, return original text). Caveman/Ponytail system prompt injection for terser responses. Headroom external proxy integration for external compression. References: 9router rtk/index.js + rtk/applyFilter.js + rtk/filters/*. Bugs avoided: safeApply silently drops async filter results (sync check only), unused parameters.

title: 1.5 - Stream Controller & Connection Management
description: Create stream controller with: AbortController-based cancellation, byte-level stall watchdog (measure upstream bytes not transform output), graceful terminal event synthesis (e.g. Responses API response.failed), shared TextEncoder (stateless), cancel/error cleanup that awaits reader.cancel() and writer.abort(). References: 9router streamHandler.js createStreamController + pipeWithDisconnect. Bugs avoided: stall timeout race condition calling handleError after cleanup, unhandled promise rejection in cancel(), wrappedController bypass.

title: 5.2 - Usage Tracking & Cost
description: Extract token usage from ALL formats (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Responses, Ollama). Normalize to canonical prompt_tokens/completion_tokens. Cost calculation: subtract cached_tokens AND cache_creation_input_tokens from nonCachedInput (chống double-count). Streaming usage estimation fallback when provider doesn't return usage. Persist ALL token fields (cached, reasoning, cache_read, cache_creation). Functional observability toggle (no field name typo). References: 9router usageTracking.js + requestDetail.js + pricing.js. Bugs avoided: cache_creation_input_tokens double-counted in cost, saveUsageStats drops cache/reasoning tokens, appendRequestLog no-op, observability toggle field name typo (enableObservability2).

title: 2.4 - Combo & Fusion
description: Combo definition: sequential model list with 3 strategies. FALLBACK: try models in order, retry transient errors (502/503/504) with delay. ROUND-ROBIN: rotate through models with sticky limit (N requests per model). FUSION: parallel panel executors with quorum-grace collection, then judge model synthesizes final answer. Capability auto-switch: detect required capabilities (vision/pdf/search) and reorder models. References: 9router combo.js handleComboChat + handleFusionChat. Bugs avoided: fusion timeout leak (in-flight requests never aborted), lone-survivor re-requests model instead of using result, flattenToolHistory creates consecutive assistant roles, rotation state migration path incomplete (NaN index).

title: 2.1 - Provider Credential Management
description: Manage per-provider credentials with encrypted storage. Implement multiple account strategies: fill-first (priority-based), round-robin with sticky limit (N consecutive requests to same account before rotating). Mutex-protected account selection to prevent race conditions. Persist credentials with encrypted OAuth tokens. References: 9router src/sse/services/auth.js. Bugs avoided: mutex stuck on exception (resolveMutex never called), race between account selection and lock write, live _connection reference causes stale reads.

title: 3.5 - Proxy & Network Layer
description: Environment proxy support: HTTP_PROXY, HTTPS_PROXY, ALL_PROXY, NO_PROXY (with glob/wildcard matching). Connection-level proxy per-provider override. Vercel relay: x-relay-target + x-relay-path headers. MITM DNS bypass: resolve real IP via Google DNS for known MITM-intercepted hosts. EXACT hostname matching (not substring includes). createBypassRequest with HTTPS socket + correct default method GET. Response headers returned as case-insensitive Headers, not Map. References: 9router proxyFetch.js. Bugs avoided: MITM bypass includes() substring match (evil-api.githubcopilot.com), default POST instead of GET, Map headers case-sensitive, abort signal not passed to https.request.

title: 7.1 - Unit Tests
description: Comprehensive unit tests for every component: model parsing edge cases (/model, provider/, empty), format translation round-trip for EVERY format pair, account selection strategies (fill-first, round-robin, sticky limit), token refresh dedup, cost calculation with cache tokens, SSRF guard bypass attempts, model lock/unlock, stream controller abort scenarios. References: all 9router bug patterns as test cases.

title: 1.2 - Format Detection & Translation Pipeline
description: Detect source format from endpoint path + request body shape (openai, claude, gemini, openai-responses, antigravity, etc.). Implement translator registry dispatching by (source, target) format pair. Support direct route for exact pairs, pivot route through OpenAI intermediate format as fallback. ENSURE every request translator has a matching response translator for round-trip symmetry. References: 9router translator/index.js + formats.js. Bugs avoided: missing response translators (gemini/vertex/kiro/cursor), Claude misclassified as OpenAI, developer role dropped.

title: 3.2 - Default / OpenAI-Compatible Executor
description: Handle OpenAI chat completions + responses endpoints. Anthropic-compatible providers: x-api-key header + Bearer token dual auth for gateways. Gemini-format providers: streamGenerateContent/generateContent path construction. json_schema to json_object fallback for providers without structured output. Provider-specific quirks: drop client_metadata, strip unsupported params. References: 9router default.js + executors/index.js. Bugs avoided: credentials.runtimeTransport mutate in-place, stale translatedBody used after credential refresh retry.

title: 1.3 - Request Translation (All Format Pairs)
description: Implement all request translators: OpenAI-to-Claude (role mapping, tool format, image content, thinking blocks, system prompt), Claude-to-OpenAI (system message, tool_use/tool_result, thinking stripping), Gemini-to-OpenAI (parts mapping, functionCall, thought blocks), OpenAI-to-Gemini (system_instruction, safety_settings, toolConfig), plus Kiro/Cursor/Ollama/CommandCode formats. NEVER hardcode max_tokens. NEVER drop developer role. NEVER drop thinking blocks. References: 9router open-sse/translator/request/*. Bugs avoided: developer role dropped, thinking lost, max_tokens hardcoded 32000, tool calls dropped.

title: 2.2 - Token Refresh & OAuth
description: Implement per-provider OAuth token refresh. Refresh with retry: jittered exponential backoff (not linear). Dedup concurrent refresh calls to same account (cache in-flight promise, not null result). Detect unrecoverable errors (invalid_grant, refresh_token_reused) and STOP retry. Vertex JWT minting with in-memory cache + TTL. References: 9router tokenRefresh.js + dedup.js + providers.js. Bugs avoided: dedup caches null for 10s, Object.assign race on credentials, getAllAccessTokens drops providerSpecificData (Kiro needs it), vertex unreachable via getAccessToken.

title: 3.1 - Base Executor Trait & HTTP Client
description: trait ProviderExecutor with async fn execute(). Common HTTP logic: URL building from multiple base URLs, header construction, retry with config per status code. Proxy-aware fetch: env proxy (HTTP_PROXY/HTTPS_PROXY), connection-level proxy override, Vercel relay. AbortSignal integration. Connection timeout vs stream stall timeout. References: 9router base.js + default.js. Bugs avoided: ProxyAgent leak on concurrent init, global fetch patching, Headers object spread into plain object loses headers.

title: 4.3 - SSRF Protection
description: Block internal/private IPs from server-side fetches. Block IPv4-mapped IPv6 (::ffff:127.0.0.1). Block decimal IP representations. Block shorthand IP (127.1). Block IPv6 shorthand. DNS rebinding protection through explicit IP resolution check. Allow-listed public hostnames only. References: 9router ssrfGuard.js. Bugs avoided: bypass via decimal IP 2130706433, bypass via ::ffff:127.0.0.1, bypass via shorthand 127.1.

title: 1.1 - Model Parsing & Provider Resolution
description: Parse model string provider/model format with enum-based provider registry. Handle: provider alias resolution, model alias resolution, combo detection (model without /), reserved prefix protection to prevent user-defined prefixes overriding built-in providers. Must extract provider and model from strings like kr/claude-sonnet-4.5, handle edge cases like /model (empty provider) and provider/ (empty model), and reject unknown prefixes gracefully. References: 9router model.js + src/sse/services/model.js. Bugs avoided: dead code combo re-detection, models with slashes, double parsing.

title: 4.1 - API Key System
description: API key generation with HMAC-SHA256 integrity check. Format: sk-{machineId}-{keyId}-{crc8}. CRC verification with timing-safe compare (crypto.timingSafeEq). KeyId generation with cryptographically secure RNG. Configurable HMAC secret (non-hardcoded default). Old format backward compatibility (legacy keys without CRC). References: 9router apiKey.js. Bugs avoided: HMAC secret hardcoded default, verifyApiKeyCrc dead code (never called by validateApiKey), Math.random() for keyId, string comparison !== timing leak.

title: 7.2 - Integration & E2E Tests
description: Full request lifecycle tests: body->translate->execute->stream->usage with mock HTTP server. Combo fallback with mock executors that simulate failures. Token refresh with mock OAuth server. Concurrent request safety test (N simultaneous requests to same account). Database persistence + import/export round-trip. References: all CRITICAL/HIGH bugs from 9router audit as test scenarios.
